title: Sales analytics should show how much we made this month ( so far )
excerpt: Feature request - Can we see a section in the sales analytics where we know exactly how much money we made this month so far. ( and also how much we made last month for comparision). This will help in planning the month. …

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml: Feature request - Can we see a section in the sales analytics where we know exactly how much money we made this month so far. ( and also how much we made last month for comparision). This will help in planning the month.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @kranthi_thoughtflow for the request!

I have changed the section so it is in the feature requests section
